description: A clean designed screenshot-style graphic reproducing a Truth Social / X post from Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump) on a white background. The top-left shows the circular avatar with Trump's face stylized as a U.S. flag (blue stars over one eye, red-and-white stripes), beside bold black 'Donald J. Trump' name, a pink/magenta verified checkmark badge, a dark square Truth Social app icon, and the grey '@realDonaldTrump' handle below. The post body is set in large black sans-serif text reading verbatim: 'The Chancellor of Germany should spend more time on ending the war with Russia/Ukraine (Where he has been totally ineffective!), and fixing his broken Country, especially Immigration and Energy, and less time on interfering with those that are getting rid of the Iran Nuclear threat, thereby making the World, including Germany, a safer place! President DJT'. Messaging technique: a minimalist quote-card amplifying the President's combative foreign-policy commentary, attacking the German Chancellor while asserting U.S. leadership on Ukraine and Iran. Target audience: MAGA base and political followers of the Rapid Response 47 war-room account.
notable_text: The Chancellor of Germany should spend more time on ending the war with Russia/Ukraine... and less time on interfering with those that are getting rid of the Iran Nuclear threat... President DJT
